headline: Stop gaining weight—commit to losing today
summary: You're gaining 0.05 kg/week when you need to lose 0.70 kg/week; today demands strict portion control and deliberate movement.
details: Replace all snacking urges with pre-portioned Huel meals—eliminate emotional eating completely today. Execute 45 minutes on the treadmill or rowing machine at a challenging, sustained pace. This single day's discipline compounds into the weekly deficit you need; your current trajectory misses your 88 kg goal by June 2027—every Tuesday counts.
